== Notes for [[Item:Q87800|Q87800]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cornelia_gens Cornelia ''gens'']

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_the_Cornelii_Scipiones Family Tree of the Cornelli Scipiones]

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Publius_Cornelius_Scipio_Nasica_(consul_191_BC) Publius Cornelius Scipio Nasica (consul 191 BC)]

[https://www.google.com/books/edition/First_Latin_Reading_Book/tJYAAAAAYAAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Publius+Cornelius+Scipio+Nasica+consul+191&pg=PA83&printsec=frontcover ''First Latin Reading Book'' "Publius Cornelius Scipio Nasica—Consul B.C.191]

[https://www.google.com/books/edition/Roman_Religion/B8o5EAAAQBAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Publius+Cornelius+Scipio+Nasica+consul+191&pg=PA214&printsec=frontcover ''Roman Religion: A Sourcebook'']

[https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/From_the_Founding_of_the_City/Book_36#38 Livy. ''From the Founding of the City: War Against Antiochus - First Stage'' Bk. 36, No. 38]

[https://military-history.fandom.com/wiki/Publius_Cornelius_Scipio_Nasica Military-History.Fandom: Publius Cornelius Scipio Nasica]

[https://www.google.com/books/edition/A_Manual_of_Roman_Antiquities/q7JOAAAAMAAJ?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Publius+Cornelius+Scipio+Nasica+consul+191&pg=PA89&printsec=frontcover A Manual of Roman Antiquities]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
